message: Fix Erdos-Straus: remove wrong HF dataset link (was pointing to Zaremba repo)
Fix experiment page: Key Results text overflow, status badge, hardware block styling
Update llms.txt: 7 HF datasets, 16 findings, 47 reviews, 5 closed exception sets
Add Zaremba density experiment page: 65 runs, 5 closed exception sets, 5 findings
New experiments: prime convergents + Erdos-Straus; close Ramsey, class numbers, MCTS
Hausdorff N=15→N=40 fix, correlation coefficients, exception hierarchy references
Update pair hierarchy: k^{-5.83} power law, amplification growth, {2,k} at 1e11
New finding: inverse-square amplification law for digit 1 in Zaremba density
Update findings: digit-pair hierarchy at 10^11, S30 Kronecker recomputation
